title: City Creator
description: In this Modpack your challenge is create cities using the MineColonies mod with the help of other mods such as Create.  In this pack you'll put building as well as survival skills to the test to automate, create, and thrive.
body:
![Title of modpack "CITY CREATOR"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44a0fe70cf04e6ea97a185175a5a90d961fc3b6b.png)

**ℹ️ ABOUT ℹ️**

Ever wanted to put your Create mod skills to test?
Ever wanted to build a steampunk city filled gadgets and gizmos?
Well in this modpack, that's exactly what you'll do!
In this Modpack, your challenge is create cities using the MineColonies mod with the help of other mods such as Create. Putting your building as well as survival skills to the test to automate, create, and thrive.
Go from a settlement, to a town, to a city!

**⚙️ MODS INCLUDED ⚙️**

A list of the main mods in this modpack:
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create). Take full use of this mod and automate farms     such as iron, wheat, and wood!
- [MineColonies](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecolonies). Using this mod you'll be able to make city and colonies of your own!
- [Point Blank](https://modrinth.com/mod/vics-point-blank). Defend your home with gun and grenades galore! Got a zombie infestation? Not a problem! Just leave that to and AK47!
- [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix). This mod improves performance, reduces memory usage, and fixes many bugs to make those heavy farms less FPS impactive.

And there's even more where came from!

**🎉 SO WHAT ARE YOU WAITING FOR! 🎉**

Hit that download button and join the party!

Sub to my YT Account for anything suggestions or just to hang oyt with videos of create! https://www.youtube.com/@Ballpark_Creations
